prompts: Luxury cruise ballroom during a storm, chandelier sway and polished floor reflections. An androgynous ship band performer in formal stage attire with a compact instrument case and a feminine luxury cruise passenger in elegant storm-night evening wear with practical shoes. The performer catches the passenger before a harmless slip on the polished floor, balanced supportive movement, no injury, cinematic anime realism, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous ballroom shot; after ten seconds the passenger steadies their feet and nods thanks while the androgynous performer releases the supportive hold, calm crowd behind them, chandelier swaying slightly, storm reflections on the floor, cinematic anime realism, no text, no watermark.
